# jamfschool_ibeacon (List Resource)

Lists iBeacons in Jamf School.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "jamfschool_ibeacon" "example" {
  provider = jamfschool
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name_prefix` (String) Optional name prefix filter.
